channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: French soldier serving with UNIFIL killed in Lebanon attack
item.description: The deadly incident comes just days after Israel and Lebanon announced a 10-day ceasefire.

item.title: Trump claims on Iranian concessions trigger questions, rejections in Tehran
item.description: The political drama culminates with the IRGC announcing that the Strait of Hormuz is once again restricted.

item.title: Iran’s supreme leader warns of ‘new bitter defeats’ for US and Israel
item.description: Iran’s Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei warned the navy was ready to inflict ‘new bitter defeats’ on the US and Israel.

item.title: Iran’s deputy FM says no date for more US talks until ‘framework’ agreed
item.description: Iran’s Deputy Foreign Minister said talks with the US cannot happen until the two sides agree on a shared ‘framework'.

item.title: Iran closes Strait of Hormuz again over US blockade of its ports
item.description: Reports of Iranian gunboats opening fire on tanker after Tehran says it is closing waterway until US lifts its blockade.

item.title: Gunfire reported by vessel in Strait of Hormuz
item.description: A maritime agency reported that a tanker was fired on by gunboats in the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Turkiye woos investors amid Iran war fallout in Gulf economies
item.description: Turkish officials are promoting Istanbul as a regional financial hub amid the war's fallout on the Gulf economies.

item.title: US blockade of Iran needs to end before the Strait of Hormuz is fully reope
item.description: Michael Shoebridge says US may be forced to end blockade of Iran to see the full reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Ambulance crew in south Lebanon describes Israel’s ‘triple-tap’ attack
item.description: Ambulance workers in Lebanon recall Israeli ‘triple-tap’ targeted strikes which killed four paramedics and wounded six.

item.title: As oil prices plunge below $91 after weeks, a new Hormuz crisis emerges
item.description: Brent crude falls over 9 percent after Iran said it will reopen waterway, only to shut it again over US blockade.
